dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard

presenters.title: Presenter Management
presenters.subtitle: Add, edit, and manage presenter accounts
presenters.name: Name
presenters.accountActiveDesc: Allows the presenter to log in and use the platform
presenters.broadcastPermissionDesc: Allows the presenter to broadcast when a scheduled program exists
presenters.singleStationDesc: Belongs to one internal station only. Enters the studio via the program schedule.
presenters.singleStationBadge: Uses program schedule — linked to one station only
presenters.multiStationDesc: Can be linked to multiple stations. Fully managed by admin. Uses program schedule.
presenters.multiStationBadge: Uses program schedule — can be linked to multiple stations
presenters.directDjDesc: Outside the station and schedule system entirely. Connects directly to personal radios.
presenters.directDjBadge: Bypasses program schedule — connects directly to personal radios
presenters.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep the current password
presenters.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this presenter?
presenters.deleteWarning: All presenter data will be permanently deleted
presenters.dependencyCheckDesc: Red items block permanent deletion. Clean up what you can, then click "Delete Permanently" when conditions are met.
presenters.disableAllProgramsConfirm: All programs for this presenter will be disabled. Recordings will not be deleted.
presenters.activeProgramsBlocking: ⚠ {count} active program(s) blocking deletion. Click "Disable all programs" to clear the blocker.
presenters.inactiveProgramsInfo: ℹ {count} disabled program(s) kept for history — does not block deletion.
presenters.recordingsBlocking: 🔴 Recordings block permanent deletion (database constraint). Delete recordings manually from the recordings page first.
presenters.cleanupLiveSessionsConfirm: Are you sure? Historical live session records for this presenter will be deleted. Audio recordings will not be deleted from here.
presenters.liveSessionsBlocking: Live sessions block permanent deletion until cleaned up. Recordings must be deleted first if they exist.
presenters.cleanupLegacySchedulesConfirm: Legacy broadcast schedules for this presenter will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
presenters.unlinkAllStationsConfirm: The presenter will be unlinked from all stations.
presenters.deleteDjRadiosConfirm: All Direct DJ radios for this presenter will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
presenters.deleteSonicPanelConfirm: SonicPanel credentials for this presenter will be deleted.
presenters.deleteValidityConfirm: Broadcast validity data for this presenter will be deleted.
presenters.profileAutoDelete: ℹ Automatically deleted during the permanent deletion process.
presenters.accessLogsAutoDelete: ℹ Automatically deleted during the permanent deletion process.
presenters.createdSuccess: Presenter added successfully! You can add another or return to the list.
presenters.tryAdjustFilters: Try adjusting or clearing filters to see more results.
presenters.addFirstPresenter: Add a new presenter to get started.
presenters.accountTypeDesc: Account type determines studio behavior and credentials.
presenters.accountTypeCannotChange: Cannot be changed from the UI after creation.
presenters.accountTypeCannotChangeEdit: Account type determines studio behavior and credentials. Cannot be changed after creation from this page — contact the developer if you need to convert.
presenters.validationSingleStation: You must select one station for this account type.
presenters.validationMultiStation: You must select at least one station for this account type.
presenters.singleStationHint: Select the only station for this presenter. Cannot be changed later from the normal UI.
presenters.multiStationHint: Select at least one station. Stations can be edited later from the presenter edit page.
presenters.noActiveStations: No active stations. Add a station first.
presenters.directDjNoteDesc: Personal radios can be added from the presenter edit page after creating the account. This account is not linked to internal stations.
presenters.unexpectedResponse: Unexpected response from server ({status}). Make sure you are logged in and try again.
presenters.savedPresenter: Presenter data and broadcast schedule saved successfully.
presenters.singleStationLocked: This account is linked to one station and cannot be changed from this page. Contact the developer if you need to switch stations.
presenters.noStationAssigned: No station assigned yet. Use the new presenter page to assign a station or contact the developer.
presenters.multiStationEditHint: Select the stations this presenter is allowed to broadcast on. Cannot remove a station that has programs linked to this presenter.
presenters.stationErrorPrograms: Cannot remove the station because the presenter has programs linked to it. Delete the programs first.
presenters.stationErrorEmpty: You must select at least one station.
presenters.changePasswordDesc: Enter a new password for this presenter. No other fields will be affected.
presenters.pwErrorShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
presenters.pwErrorMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
presenters.validityDesc: This validity determines whether the presenter account is active and can use the platform.
presenters.validityScheduleNote: Program schedules and broadcast times are managed from
presenters.validityDirectDjDesc: Account validity controls login and platform access only.
presenters.djRadiosDesc: These radios are exclusive to this presenter, and they choose from them when entering the studio.
presenters.addDjRadioHint: Add a radio below to enable Direct DJ broadcasting.
presenters.deleteRadioConfirm: Delete radio "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
presenters.keepCurrentPassword: Leave password blank to keep the current one.
presenters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, email, or phone...

stations.title: Station Management
stations.subtitle: Create, edit, and manage radio stations
stations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this station?
stations.dependencyListDesc: Red dependencies must be cleaned up before permanent deletion.
stations.depProgramsClean: No programs — station can be deleted.
stations.depProgramsBlocking: All programs must be deleted first (direct FK dependency). Recordings will be preserved.
stations.depPresenterLinksNote: {count} link(s) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted (Cascade). Presenter accounts will not be deleted.
stations.depSingleStationPresentersClean: No presenters linked to this station only.
stations.depSingleStationPresentersNote: ⚠️ {count} SINGLE_STATION presenter(s) linked to this station only. After deletion they will lose their station link — reassign them to another station or delete them first.
stations.depManagersNote: {count} assignment(s) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted. Manager accounts will not be deleted.
stations.depDefaultCredNote: Default DJ credentials ({username}) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted (Cascade).
stations.depRecordingsNote: {count} recording(s) — will not be deleted when the station is deleted. They will only be unlinked (stationId → null). Audio files are preserved.
stations.depSonicPanelNote: {count} record(s) — will be unlinked (stationId → null) without being deleted.
stations.depBroadcastSchedulesNote: {count} legacy broadcast schedule(s) — will be unlinked (stationId → null) without being deleted.
stations.deleteProgramsConfirm:
Are you sure? All programs ({count}) linked to the station will be deleted.

Recordings will not be deleted — they will only be unlinked from programs.
Schedule rules and slots will be deleted automatically.
stations.unlinkPresentersConfirm:
Are you sure? Links for {count} presenter(s) to this station will be removed.

Presenter accounts will not be deleted. DIRECT_DJ presenters will not be affected.
stations.removeManagersConfirm:
Are you sure? Assignments for {count} manager(s) will be removed from this station.

Manager accounts will not be deleted.
stations.deleteDjCredConfirm: Are you sure? Default DJ credentials for the station will be deleted.
stations.hardDeleteBlockedDesc: Station cannot be deleted until the following are cleaned up:
stations.hardDeleteReadyDesc: All critical dependencies have been cleaned up. Recordings are preserved and will be unlinked automatically. Presenter data and accounts will not be deleted.
stations.hardDeleteConfirm:
Are you absolutely sure?

Station "{name}" will be permanently deleted.

• Presenter and manager accounts will not be deleted.
• Recordings will not be deleted — they will only be unlinked from the station.

This action cannot be undone.
stations.stationAndDjCreatedSuccess: Station created and DJ credentials saved successfully.
stations.djNoteBody: Default DJ credentials are only used as a fallback when the presenter does not have their own SonicPanel credentials. If a presenter has SonicPanel credentials in their profile, those will be used instead.
stations.slugHint: (Unique identifier — lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only)
stations.listenHostHint: Public stream listening address — not DJ server
stations.publicUrlHint: Direct listening URL — shown on public pages
stations.djCredentialsDescription: Default DJ connection credentials. Used as fallback when no presenter-specific SonicPanel credentials are set.
stations.djNotConfigured: ⚠️ DJ credentials not configured — presenters cannot connect without them
stations.djCredentialsOptionalDescription: You can add default DJ credentials now or later from the station edit page.
stations.tryModifyFilters: Try modifying filters or clearing them to see more results.
stations.addFirstStation: Add a new station to get started.
stations.searchPlaceholder: Search by station name, slug, or description...

media.deleteTrackConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this track?
media.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the server.
media.audioFilesLabel: Audio files * (MP3 / WAV — up to 50 MB per file)

schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage the weekly broadcast schedule
schedule.auditDesc: Comprehensive check for conflicts and errors — read-only, no data is modified.
schedule.noIssuesDesc: All schedules, presenters, and stations appear to be in good shape.
schedule.auditCheckA: A — Two programs overlap on the same station
schedule.auditCheckB: B — Same presenter scheduled in two programs at the same time (across stations)
schedule.auditCheckC: C — Presenter linked to a program but not linked to the program's station
schedule.auditCheckD: D — Direct DJ presenter added to a program schedule (not supported)
schedule.auditCheckE: E — Single-station presenter linked to more than one station
schedule.auditCheckF: F — Active program with no schedule rules
schedule.auditCheckG: G — Active program on a disabled station
schedule.checkTypeC: C — Presenter not linked to station
schedule.checkTypeD: D — Direct DJ in a program
schedule.checkTypeG: G — Program on a disabled station
schedule.headerSubtitle: View all programs and scheduled slots
schedule.noProgramsMatchFilter: No programs match the current filter.
schedule.issueTypeC: Presenter not linked to program station
schedule.issueSuggA: Adjust the schedule of one of the programs to remove the overlap.
schedule.issueDescB: Presenter "{presenter}" is scheduled in two programs at the same time across different stations.
schedule.issueSuggB: A presenter cannot broadcast on two stations at the same time.
schedule.issueDescC: Program "{title}" is linked to a presenter not added to station "{station}".
schedule.issueSuggC: Add the presenter to the station from the presenter edit page.
schedule.issueDescD: Direct DJ presenter "{presenter}" is added to program "{title}" — this is not supported.
schedule.issueSuggD: Delete this program. Direct DJ presenters do not use program schedules.
schedule.issueSuggE: Unlink the presenter from extra stations or change the account type to MULTI_STATION.
schedule.issueDescF: Program "{title}" on "{station}" is active but has no schedule rules.
schedule.issueSuggF: Add schedule rules from the program edit page.
schedule.issueDescG: Program "{title}" is active but its station "{station}" is disabled.
schedule.issueSuggG: Disable the program or re-enable the station.

status.title: System Status
status.subtitle: Monitor system health and services
status.mod1Detail: Auth.js v5 · JWT · bcrypt · /admin route protection
status.mod2Detail: Full CRUD · Admin table · Route protection · Next.js 15 params fix
status.mod3Detail: allowConnectMinutesBefore · Check current time against schedule
status.mod4Detail: AES-256-GCM · Encrypted storage in database · Decryption on demand
status.mod5Detail: BACKGROUND / SONG sections · Track management · Full admin interface
status.mod6Detail: Same Auth.js system · role=PRESENTER · Auto redirect to /studio
status.mod7Detail: Live second-by-second countdown · Self-updating · Entry button when time is up
status.mod8Detail: Browser + Server + Microphone check · Block entry before completion
status.mod9Detail: Microphone control · Media library · Status broadcasting · Full RTL
status.mod10Detail: Web Audio API · AnalyserNode · Live SVG bars animation
status.mod11Detail: Sends every 5 seconds · Updates LiveSession in database
status.mod12Detail: Live table · Auto-refresh every 5 seconds · Stale session detection
